title: Fixing React Memoized Component Re-renders on Array Reference Change

statement.markdown: You are given a React component that uses memoization to optimize re-renders. However, the component is re-rendering unnecessarily when the `items` prop changes. Your task is to fix the bug and prevent unnecessary re-renders. The component should only re-render when the `items` prop changes or when the `onClick` function changes.
statement.inputFormat: The input will be an object with `items` and `onClick` properties.
statement.outputFormat: The output should be the same as the input, but with the additional `key` property set to a unique value.
statement.notes: Time complexity: O(n), where n is the number of items. Space complexity: O(1).

constraints.description: The number of items in the array

examples.explanation: The component should re-render because the `items` prop has changed.
The component should re-render because the `onClick` function has changed.
The component should not re-render because the `items` prop and `onClick` function have not changed.

hints.text: Use the `useCallback` hook to memoize the `onClick` function.
Use the `useMemo` hook to memoize the `key` property.

editorial.title: Fixing React Memoized Component Re-renders on Array Reference Change
editorial.intuition: The problem is that the `items` prop is changing, but the `key` property is not being updated. This is causing the component to re-render unnecessarily.
editorial.bruteForce: One way to solve this problem is to use the `useMemo` hook to memoize the `key` property. However, this will not prevent the component from re-rendering when the `items` prop changes.
editorial.betterSolution: A better solution is to use the `useCallback` hook to memoize the `onClick` function. This will prevent the component from re-rendering when the `onClick` function changes.
editorial.optimalSolution: The optimal solution is to use both `useCallback` and `useMemo` to memoize the `onClick` function and the `key` property, respectively. This will prevent the component from re-rendering unnecessarily.
editorial.proofOfCorrectness: The corrected component will only re-render when the `items` prop changes or when the `onClick` function changes.
commonMistakes: Not using the `useCallback` hook to memoize the `onClick` function.
Not using the `useMemo` hook to memoize the `key` property.
